metadata.description: Native-first, low-friction companion plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: task-queue
plugins.description: Resume bridge + auto-advance for Claude Code's native task list — re-surfaces a repo's unfinished tasks from earlier sessions, hydrates the queue from a committed roadmap/backlog file when present, and points the model at the next unblocked task as each one completes. Goes quiet once the policy is recorded in CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Tidy-as-you-touch: formats and lint-checks the file you just edited (fixing what's safe) and holds a subtractive posture (reuse before create, delete what a change makes redundant) so an active project trends down in complexity over time, scoped to the touched file. Goes quiet once the standard is recorded in CLAUDE.md. MVP targets Go.

plugins.name: charter
plugins.description: Know the project: gates substantive work on documented quality attributes (web projects get Lighthouse-aligned defaults — CWV, a11y, print CSS, progressive enhancement, components-by-default), maintains a committed Claude-facing roadmap/backlog file (cross-session/engineer coordination), and keeps a project map (file→responsibility index) so a session orients from the map instead of re-scanning the tree. Generates the docs from the codebase/git history when missing.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: A consolidated status line: animated beacon, open tasks + in-progress, paused state, quality-attributes status, last tidy action, tokens up/down, git branch, and model — read-only from existing plugin state, zero model-token cost.
